title: XanaNode Hugo Theme Definition
summary: theme.toml is preserved as a raw Hugo source artifact in the XanaNode Hugo substrate.
content:
name = "XanaNode Hugo"
license = "MIT"
licenselink = "https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT"
description = "A relationship-first Hugo theme for essays, concepts, sources, evidence, claims, and trails."
homepage = "https://xananode.com/"
tags = ["knowledge", "graph", "hypertext", "xanadu", "provenance", "digital garden"]
features = ["relationship graph", "concept nodes", "source cards", "claim blocks", "trail pages", "JSON graph export"]
min_version = "0.120.0"

[author]
  name = "Christian Siefen"
  homepage = "https://xananode.com/"
